snapshot.title: Define next science-feed cache intake for daily puzzles
snapshot.description: This is part of the 2026-04-20 Star Sailors MVP/project-management reset. Project: Saily / The Daily Sail. Work must stay tied to MVP closure, distribution, testing, or agent handoff for this week.

acceptanceCriteria.text: One source is selected for the next post-MVP expansion.
Cache schema and ingestion steps are documented.
No live API dependency is required for the daily play path.

snapshot.implementationPlan:
1. Use the importable science feeds research to pick the next practical data source.
2. Define how raw source data becomes a stable daily mission cache.

changes.oldValue:
1. Use the importable science feeds research to pick the next practical data source.
2. Define how raw source data becomes a stable daily mission cache.
changes.newValue:
1. Refresh Knowns docs so narrative/spec references match the new science-feed mapping
2. Extend science-feed research with concrete intake recommendations for CoM, Gaia Variables, Rubin Comet Catchers, and Active Asteroids
3. Add code-side source descriptors and cache-oriented types for the four new feeds
4. Run focused validation and append notes back to Knowns

changes.newValue:
Created by project-management reset on 2026-04-20.

Progress: updated specs/characters-storylines + research/importable-science-feeds for CoM, Gaia Variables, Rubin Comet Catchers, and Active Asteroids; added web/src/lib/science-feeds.ts registry and unit tests.
